items.example: Where does he work? He works at a hospital.
Where do you live? I live in Hanoi.
How does she commute? She takes the bus.
Do you have breakfast every day? Yes, I do.

Does your family have dinner together?

What do you do in your free time?

What transport do you use every day?

Why do they always arrive late?

How far is your school from home?
